summary: Frontend-only testing of ATMAN static site refactor (backend + admin removed, Google Sheets + Netlify Forms). All 10 requested checks executed. Landing loads with 200, no console/page errors. Hero, sections, defaults, iframes, /admin wildcard, mobile menu, testimonials all work. Booking form validates gracefully with sonner toast on network failure (expected in preview since Netlify Forms only work post-deploy).

integration_issues.issue: Empty-submit toast from handleSubmit does NOT fire because inputs have HTML5 `required` attribute — browser native validation intercepts submit before JS handler runs. Non-crashing and shows browser tooltip, so functionally graceful, but the review request explicitly wanted a sonner toast for empty submissions. Consider removing `required` on inputs OR adding noValidate on <form> if the sonner toast path is preferred.

action_items: OPTIONAL: If you want the custom sonner toast to fire on empty submit (as stated in review request), add `noValidate` to the <form> in Booking.jsx OR remove HTML5 `required` attributes. Currently, browser native tooltip fires instead — still graceful, but not the sonner UX described in the review.
No other action items. Site is deploy-ready for Netlify.
critical_code_review_comments: Booking.jsx line 165/178/190: `required` attrs on inputs bypass the custom sonner validation toast in handleSubmit. Pick one validation strategy.

Footer.jsx: A mailto social icon always renders because DEFAULT_SETTINGS.email is always set. Not a bug, just note that 'social icons only render when URL provided' isn't strictly true for the email default — 1 icon (email) always shows. If pristine 'zero-icon' state is desired when sheet not configured, add `s.email !== DEFAULT_SETTINGS.email` guard or remove email from socials list.
useSiteData.js is clean, well-documented, and handles fallback correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend testing skipped intentionally. Frontend is fully static now; /admin/* wildcard renders Landing (verified no password field). Netlify Forms will only work after actual Netlify deployment — 'Submission failed' toast in preview is expected. Mobile hamburger (data-testid: mobile-menu-toggle) toggles fine. 3 fallback YouTube iframes render since REACT_APP_SHEET_ID unset. Default contact info shown as expected.
